summary: Materials List Dropdown Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Frontend UI successfully changed from plain Input fields to Select dropdown components with inline create-new functionality. All 12 test scenarios verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation follows the same pattern as PlanningBoard's Package creation dialog material section
Material Name dropdown (data-testid='proj-mat-name-{idx}') shows list of material names from API with '+ Create New Material' option
Brand dropdown (data-testid='proj-mat-brand-{idx}') shows only brands filtered by selected material with '+ Create New Brand' option
Brand dropdown correctly disabled when no material is selected
Inline create-new flow: Input field with green check (confirm) and X (cancel) buttons appears when selecting create option
Auto-save with 600ms debounce works correctly - verified by page refresh persistence test
Each material row wrapped in dashed border card with #index, Material Name Select, Brand Select, and Delete button
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project proj_2d500929fbe9 with pre-saved materials: Cement/UltraTech, Steel/TATA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Materials List dropdown feature is fully functional. The UI now uses Select dropdown components instead of plain Input fields. Material Name dropdown shows all material names from /api/material-names with '+ Create New Material' option. Brand dropdown shows brands filtered by selected material from /api/brands?category={materialName} with '+ Create New Brand' option. Brand dropdown is disabled when no material is selected. Inline create-new flow shows input with confirm/cancel buttons. Auto-save with 600ms debounce persists changes.

verified_features.Materials List Section Visible: PASS - data-testid='pkg-materials-section' visible when project has package_id
verified_features.Material Name Dropdown (Select component: PASS - data-testid='proj-mat-name-{idx}' shows Select dropdown, not Input
verified_features.Material Names from API: PASS - Dropdown shows Cement, Steel, Sand, and other materials from /api/material-names
verified_features.+ Create New Material option: PASS - Blue text option at bottom of dropdown
verified_features.Create New Material Input Flow: PASS - Input field with green check and X cancel buttons appears
verified_features.Brand Dropdown (Select component): PASS - data-testid='proj-mat-brand-{idx}' shows Select dropdown, not Input
verified_features.Brand Dropdown Filtered by Material: PASS - Shows only brands for selected material (e.g., UltraTech for Cement)
verified_features.Brand Dropdown Disabled When No Material: PASS - Disabled with 'Pick material first' placeholder
verified_features.+ Create New Brand option: PASS - Blue text option at bottom of dropdown
verified_features.Create New Brand Input Flow: PASS - Input field with green check and X cancel buttons appears
verified_features.Add Material Button: PASS - data-testid='add-project-material' adds new row with empty dropdowns
verified_features.Auto-save Persistence: PASS - Changes persist after page refresh (verified with Sand material)
